navbar.banner_text: Your contribution will help us move forward

footer.tagline: Every drop counts. Federal Blood Wave is dedicated to connecting blood donors with those in need, building a stronger, healthier community together.
footer.impact_quote: "Connecting life with life. Join the wave of hope today."
footer.copyright: © 2025 Federal Blood Wave. All rights reserved.

banner.description: Connecting heroes with those in need. Join our community of lifesavers and make a difference in someone's life today.

features.feat1_desc: Every drop of blood holds the power to save a life. By donating blood, you can become a hero for someone. Join us in the simple, effective, and life-saving mission of blood donation.
features.feat2_desc: Your safety and the recipient's well-being are our top priorities. Strict testing and quality standards are ensured for every donation, making the process safe and reliable.
features.feat3_desc: Together, we can create a network of hope. Federal Blood Wave connects willing donors with those in need, ensuring that no one has to wait for life-saving blood.

hero.description: Federal Blood Wave is a purely humanitarian initiative established with the aim of bringing a major change to society through blood donation. By combining technology and humanity, we are working to build a healthy society.

why_start.heading: Why did we start?
reasons: To alleviate blood shortages and raise awareness
To find blood donors quickly in emergencies
To build a strong blood donation network
To ensure service to humanity using technology
To awaken empathy and humanity among people
To inspire the youth to volunteer

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To ensure safe and free blood donation opportunities for everyone and create a strong database in every area.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.text: Federal Blood Wave envisions an egalitarian society where no more lives are lost due to a lack of blood donors.

working_areas.heading: We are currently working in
working_areas.text: Various areas of Dhaka city such as –
working_areas.areas: Mirpur, Mohammadpur, Dhanmondi, Bashundhara, Gulshan, Uttara, Badda, Khilgaon, Malibagh, and Old Dhaka.

founder.quote: "I believe technology can bring major changes to society. Seeing people's desperation for blood, I started this initiative."
founder.description: I am Abdullah Shayed, a programmer and tech enthusiast. As the founder of Federal Blood Wave, my goal is to use technology in the service of humanity. I always believe that big changes are possible through technology. Everyone's cooperation is desired in this initiative.

contact.description: Contact us for any questions, opinions, or cooperation.

donation_m.heading: Donate Us
donation_m.description: Your contribution will help us move forward

donors.try_adjusting: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

profile.female_wait_msg: You can update again after 120 days
profile.male_wait_msg: You can update again after 90 days

auth.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
auth.body_not_prepared: Your body is not prepared for blood donation.
auth.promo_title: Be the Reason Someone Smiles Today
auth.promo_subtitle: Join our community of lifesavers. Your donation can save up to 3 lives and bring hope to families in need.
